---
title: "Page Not Found"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
description: "This page doesn't exist — but don't worry, the rest of the site does."
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

.error-shell {
  max-width: 40rem;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 4rem 1.5rem 8rem;
  text-align: center;
}

/* ── Drone crash illustration ── */
.drone-scene {
  position: relative;
  width: 14rem;
  height: 14rem;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
}

/* Smoke puffs */
.smoke {
  position: absolute;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.25);
  animation: smoke-rise 2.5s ease-out infinite;
}

body.quarto-dark .smoke {
  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.15);
}

.smoke-1 { width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; bottom: 55%; left: 38%; animation-delay: 0s; }
.smoke-2 { width: 1.8rem; height: 1.8rem; bottom: 60%; left: 50%; animation-delay: 0.8s; }
.smoke-3 { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; bottom: 50%; left: 30%; animation-delay: 1.6s; }

@keyframes smoke-rise {
  0%   { opacity: 0.7; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-3rem) scale(1.8); }
}

/* Ground */
.ground {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 10%;
  left: 5%;
  right: 5%;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--border);
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.ground::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 3px;
  left: 10%;
  right: 10%;
  height: 1.5rem;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
}

body.quarto-dark .ground::after {
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 0%, transparent 70%);
}

/* Drone body — tilted and crashed */
.drone {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 12%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(28deg);
}

.drone-body {
  width: 4.5rem;
  height: 1.6rem;
  background: var(--text-secondary);
  border-radius: 0.8rem;
  position: relative;
}

body.quarto-dark .drone-body {
  background: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.7);
}

/* Center dot (camera/sensor) */
.drone-body::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 0.6rem;
  height: 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--accent);
}

/* Arms */
.drone-arm {
  position: absolute;
  width: 3.5rem;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--text-secondary);
  top: 50%;
  transform-origin: center;
}

body.quarto-dark .drone-arm {
  background: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.6);
}

.drone-arm-1 { left: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-30deg); }
.drone-arm-2 { left: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(30deg); }
.drone-arm-3 { right: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-30deg); }
.drone-arm-4 { right: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(30deg); }

/* Propellers */
.prop {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1.8rem;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
  border-radius: 2px;
  opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Left props — one still, one detached and flying off */
.prop-1 {
  top: -0.8rem;
  left: -3.8rem;
  transform: rotate(15deg);
}

.prop-2 {
  top: 1.2rem;
  left: -3.5rem;
  transform: rotate(-60deg);
  animation: prop-fly-off 3s ease-out infinite;
}

/* Right props — one drooping, one bent */
.prop-3 {
  top: -0.6rem;
  right: -3.8rem;
  transform: rotate(-20deg);
}

.prop-4 {
  top: 1rem;
  right: -3.2rem;
  transform: rotate(75deg);
  opacity: 0.4;
}

@keyframes prop-fly-off {
  0%   { opacity: 0.6; transform: rotate(-60deg) translate(0, 0); }
  30%  { opacity: 0.5; transform: rotate(-90deg) translate(-0.8rem, -1.5rem); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: rotate(-180deg) translate(-2rem, -4rem); }
}

/* Impact lines */
.impact-line {
  position: absolute;
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--accent);
  opacity: 0.3;
  border-radius: 1px;
}

.impact-line-1 {
  width: 1.2rem;
  bottom: 14%;
  left: 22%;
  transform: rotate(-35deg);
}

.impact-line-2 {
  width: 0.8rem;
  bottom: 18%;
  right: 25%;
  transform: rotate(40deg);
}

.impact-line-3 {
  width: 1rem;
  bottom: 11%;
  right: 32%;
  transform: rotate(-15deg);
}

.error-code {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 7rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--accent);
  opacity: 0.25;
}

.error-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.error-copy {
  margin: 0 0 2rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.error-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  justify-content: center;
}

.error-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.15rem;
  border-radius: 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease;
}

.error-link.primary {
  background: var(--accent);
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.error-link.primary:hover,
.error-link.primary:focus {
  color: #fff;
  opacity: 0.92;
}

.error-link:not(.primary) {
  color: var(--accent);
  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
}

.error-link:not(.primary):hover {
  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
}

body.quarto-dark .error-link:not(.primary) {
  color: #93c5fd;
  background: rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.08);
  border-color: rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.25);
}

body.quarto-dark .error-link:not(.primary):hover {
  background: rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.15);
}
</style>

<div class="error-shell">
  <div class="drone-scene" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="smoke smoke-1"></div>
    <div class="smoke smoke-2"></div>
    <div class="smoke smoke-3"></div>
    <div class="drone">
      <div class="drone-body">
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-1"></div>
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-2"></div>
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-3"></div>
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-4"></div>
        <div class="prop prop-1"></div>
        <div class="prop prop-2"></div>
        <div class="prop prop-3"></div>
        <div class="prop prop-4"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="impact-line impact-line-1"></div>
    <div class="impact-line impact-line-2"></div>
    <div class="impact-line impact-line-3"></div>
    <div class="ground"></div>
  </div>
  <p class="error-code">404</p>
  <p class="error-title">This page crashed harder than my drones.</p>
  <p class="error-copy">
    Whatever you were looking for isn't here — but unlike a mid-flight failure, this one has an easy recovery.
  </p>
  <div class="error-links">
    <a class="error-link primary" href="./">Back to Home</a>
    <a class="error-link" href="./projects/">Projects</a>
    <a class="error-link" href="./publications/">Publications</a>
    <a class="error-link" href="./blog/">Research Blog</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
